alerts.title: Modified: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and CCCF established levels. New: Verification required via the Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and levels established by the Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF). Codex establishes Maximum Levels (MLs) for contaminants to be legally permitted in food or feed commodities to protect human health. The CCCF establishes and endorses these levels.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Allergen declaration on labels
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation for prepackaged food labels is expected to include requirements for allergen declarations. Specifics on the list of mandatory allergens and declaration format require consulting the full text of the regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements for prepackaged food stuffs must be verified by consulting the full GSO 9:2022 standard.

alerts.title: Modified: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific general requirements for Halal food must be verified by consulting the full GSO 2055-1:2015 standard.

alerts.title: Modified: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific mandatory expiration date requirements for food products must be verified by consulting the full GSO 150-1:2013 standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients must be verified by consulting the full GSO 1016:2015 standard.

alerts.title: Added: India Allergen List - Declaration of allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. All food products, including seasoning and snack products, must declare specified allergens as per FSSAI Labelling Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - General Contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Compliance with the 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act' is required, which includes standards for contaminants in food. Verification of specific limits is needed.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - General Microbiological Standards
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Compliance with the 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act' is required, which includes microbiological standards for food. Verification of specific limits is needed.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All food businesses must comply.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additive safety assessment
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be assessed for safety by SFA. Applies to all food sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required using SFA's List of Permitted Food Additives or Food Additives Search tool. New: Only SFA-assessed additives are permitted. Verification required using SFA's List of Permitted Food Additives or Food Additives Search tool.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Prohibition of unpermitted additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell food products containing unpermitted additives. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of an additive.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Compliance with contaminant limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All food businesses must comply.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Do not import or sell food products containing contaminants exceeding regulatory limits. New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Prohibition of exceeding contaminant limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell food products containing contaminants exceeding regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary drug residues (diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, dienoestrol)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Prohibition under Regulation 33 of the Food Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All ingredients and additives must be declared on food labels. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Additive Limits - γ-Aminobutyric Acid (GABA)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific use restrictions and labeling requirements for γ-Aminobutyric Acid (GABA) produced by microbial fermentation must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Mandatory Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Food allergen labeling is required for products containing Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish, and sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide for 10 or more mg/kg of food) as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. If sulphite as residue sulphur dioxide is 10 or more milligrams per kilogram of food, mandatory allergen labeling is required.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Additive Limits - Permitted/Non-permitted Ingredients
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. All ingredients used in food products must be verified against the list of permitted and non-permitted ingredients.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Verification is required to ensure the food product is not on the list of prohibited foods for production, import, or sale.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Delisted color additives in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Substances listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189) as prohibited from use in food.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, sesame. The FASTER Act declared sesame as the 9th major food allergen, effective January 1, 2023.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 1. This is a Guidance Level for Acid-hydrolyzed protein and Asian-style sauces.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level for 'Foods' generally.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. New: N/A. Must be declared on the label of all food and cosmetic products.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. New: N/A. All products containing FD&C Yellow No. 5 must identify it on their labels.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Gluten-Free Claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. A final rule defines “gluten-free” for food labeling. Compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the “gluten-free” claim were established on August 12, 2020.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Major Food Allergen Declaration (Contains Statement)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The name of the food source of a major food allergen must appear immediately after or next to the list of ingredients in a “contains” statement.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Major Food Allergen Declaration (Ingredient List)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The name of the food source of a major food allergen must appear in parentheses following the name of the ingredient.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Specific Allergen Declaration (Tree Nuts, Fish, Shellfish)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The type of tree nut, and the species of fish and Crustacean shellfish must be declared.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 10. New: 10. Must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration is ≥10 parts per million total sulfites.

alerts.title: Modified: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against GB 2760-2015. New: Verification required against GB2760-2015. Compliance with GB2760-2015 is mandatory for the use of food additives in China.

alerts.title: Removed: China Labelling Requirement - Food Safety Standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against applicable GB Food Safety Standards. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. New: Verification required via the Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database. The GSFA (Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth conditions for permitted food additives in all foods. The database is regularly updated and users are encouraged to consult it and its Preamble.

alerts.title: Modified: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins in spices
alerts.details: Old: Follow Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction. New: Follow the Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction of Mycotoxins in Spices. This is a specific code of practice (CXC 78-2017) for reducing mycotoxin contamination in spices.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The EU Additives Database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites in specific foods, and also process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: Old: Verification required against GSO 9:2022. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies the general requirements for labels of prepackaged foodstuffs. Specific details on content, format, and mandatory information require consulting the full text of the regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for certain food products, which must be declared on the label. Specific products and durations require consulting the full text of the regulation.

alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food additives in seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks must comply with the specific provisions and maximum levels laid down in the FSSAI Food Additives Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: India Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. All food products, including seasoning and snack products, must comply with general labelling and display requirements as per FSSAI regulations.

alerts.details: Old: Verification required for production, import, registration, and circulation. New: Verification required. Specific provisions regarding the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Food Category-Dependent Limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for food additives, contaminants, microbiology, salt/sodium, allergens, and labelling requirements for processed foods are determined based on the food category as defined in this regulation. Verification of the specific food category and its associated limits is required.
